description: Causal attribution graph for <YOUR DOMAIN>. Each node is a measurable KPI; edges represent causal relationships (parent causes child).

scenarios.title: Example Scenario
scenarios.description: Describe what business question this scenario addresses

nodes.label: Root KPI Name
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT AVG(metric_col) AS value FROM your_table WHERE period = '{current_period}'

nodes.label: Possible Cause A
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM your_table WHERE condition = 'X' AND period = '{current_period}'

nodes.label: Possible Cause B
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT SUM(qty) AS value FROM your_table WHERE period = '{current_period}'

nodes.label: Root Cause Candidate
nodes.metric_sql: SELECT AVG(rate) AS value FROM another_table WHERE period = '{current_period}'
